top_signals.title: Stocks Fall as Caution Builds Ahead of Alphabet: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks fell ahead of Alphabet Inc.’s earnings as traders waited for the clearest read yet on whether the vast sums technology hyperscalers are pouring into artificial intelligence are paying off.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US seeks forfeiture of $25 million in crypto tied to global fraud investigations
top_signals.summary: US prosecutors seek forfeiture of $25 million in crypto recovered from five investigations into international fraud and laundering networks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Bad news: Reach share price sinks amid digital headache and falling print sales
top_signals.summary: London listed publisher Reach continued to feel the impact of declining online views and lower print circulation, as the company continues to navigate the changing media landscape. The group’s share price sank 19.5 per cent in early trading to 47.4p, bringing the stock down 13.6 per cent since January after the company suffered a sharp [...]

top_signals.title: Upper House panel approves referendum reform bill
top_signals.summary: The bill to revise the law was backed by the ruling coalition as well as several opposition parties.
